owners.title: Mining owners
owners.blurb: Run your mine. Daily brief, licence calendar, drill-hole logger.

investors.title: Investors / Lenders
investors.blurb: Mining capital with daily evidence-cited telemetry.

hero.headline: Run your mine like the world's best.
hero.sub: AI-native operating system. Tanzanian-first. Multi-tenant. Multi-lingual.

capabilities.heading: Six capabilities, one calm operator.
capabilities.sub: Each capability ties into your mine's knowledge graph and writes to an immutable audit chain.

licence.title: Licence calendar
licence.blurb: PML, ML, and SML on one calendar. 90-, 60-, 30-day expiry warnings. Aware of Tumemadini renewal workflow.

brief.title: Daily brief
brief.blurb: Every morning at 06:00 the Master Brain shows overnight actions, decisions that need you, and gold-window treasury position.

drillhole.title: Drill-hole logger
drillhole.blurb: Field logger for drill holes and grade-control. Cores photographed, assayed, linked to a pit segment, written to the chain.

treasury.title: FX & treasury
treasury.blurb: TZS · USD · gold ounces. Hedge proposals against live BoT and LBMA spot. Off-take projections by week.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.blurb: Artisanal miners, registered traders, licensed smelters. KYC for every participant. One-click off-take agreements.

compliance.title: Compliance pack
compliance.blurb: NEMC EIA, royalty returns, OSHA logs, audit chain. Ready for submission to Tumemadini and TRA.

one.label: Sign-up + KYB
one.title: Register and verify your business.
one.body: We integrate with BRELA, TRA, and Tumemadini. Full KYB inside 48 hours. No paper forms.

two.label: Import
two.title: Bring your licences and sites.
two.body: Upload PML/ML/SML licences, pit maps, drill-hole logs. Your mine's knowledge graph builds itself.

three.label: Master Brain
three.title: Master Brain takes over.
three.body: Starts in shadow mode for 14 days. You see what it would have done. Then you grant authority, step by step.

brief.heading: Your first minute at 06:00.
brief.sub: The Master Brain handled overnight operations. Here's what it did, what it flagged, and what the numbers say.

ask.heading: Ask. It answers.
ask.sub: Not a chatbot. The mine itself speaking in the first person, grounded in its knowledge graph, with clickable citations.
ask.question: What's my cash runway?
answerPlan: Query TZS balances across all bank accounts
Fetch gold inventory and live LBMA spot
ask.answer: You hold TZS 412M in cash and 184 oz of gold worth TZS 1.18B at today's spot. Trailing 4-week burn is TZS 87M/wk. That gives you 18.3 weeks of runway — or 22 weeks if the February Geita off-take settles on time.
ask.evidence: Evidence: TRA bank-feed · LBMA spot · off-take MR-241

autonomy.heading: Your pace, not ours.
autonomy.sub: Four autonomy levels. Each is clearly defined. Nothing happens without your sign-off until you say so.

levels.executeWithApproval: Acts with your approval at each step.
levels.autonomous: Acts on its own inside your policy. Red-lines still need approval.

chain.heading: Every action is cryptographically on the record.
chain.sub: Append-only log with SHA-256 prev-hash and per-entry HMAC. Tumemadini, NEMC, and auditors can verify the chain without trusting us.

pricing.heading: Clear pricing. No surprises.
pricing.sub: Five tiers. Monthly in TZS. Start free with Mwanzo. Scale when you're ready.
pricing.footnote: All prices in TZS. Payable via M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, or bank transfer.

testimonial.heading: Pilot quotes available Q3 2026.
testimonial.sub: We're currently working with ten pioneer mining operators across Geita, Mererani, and Songwe. Once we have 12-week outcomes, we'll publish their words here.

footer.tagline: AI-native operating system for Tanzanian mining. Master Brain, audit chain, bilingual.

pilotPage.heading: Apply to join the pilot.
pilotPage.sub: We're selecting 20 mining operators for our 12-week pilot. No cost. Full flexibility. We'll work together to build a system that fits the Tanzanian context.
pilotPage.success: Thank you. We'll be in touch within 5 business days.
pilotPage.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email pilot@borjie.co.tz

pricingPage.heading: Build at your own pace.
pricingPage.sub: Five tiers. TZS. Mwanzo is free forever. We accept M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, or bank transfer.
pricingPage.compareSub: Every tier ships every feature. The difference is quotas and support.

ownersPage.heading: Run your mine like the world's best.
ownersPage.sub: Master Brain, licence calendar, drill-hole logger, FX/treasury, marketplace and compliance — all in one calm operator.

buyersPage.heading: Source verified Tanzanian minerals. End-to-end.
buyersPage.sub: KYC'd sellers, chain-of-custody assays, biometric contract signing. Buy with confidence.

valueProps.heading: Four pillars of verified supply.
valueProps.sub: Every gram on Borjie has a verifiable path from drill-hole to weighbridge.

provenance.title: Verified provenance
provenance.blurb: Chain-of-custody from drill-hole to weighbridge. Each transfer signed, timestamped, and written to the audit chain.

kyb.title: KYB'd sellers
kyb.blurb: Borjie audits every seller before listing. BRELA, TRA, and Tumemadini cross-checks. No anonymous traders.

assays.title: Assay certificates
assays.blurb: LBMA-grade labs in Dar es Salaam and Mwanza. Fire assay for gold, ICP-MS for coltan, gemmological certs for tanzanite.

biometric.title: Biometric off-take
biometric.blurb: Contracts signed with fingerprint plus liveness. Non-repudiable. Each signature anchored on the audit chain.

useCases.heading: Buyers already on the platform.
useCases.sub: Mock pilot relationships shown — real deals are still on-boarding. Replaced with audited case studies once live.

gold.blurb: Sources 40-60 kg/month of artisanal doré from Geita and Kahama PML clusters. Borjie chain-of-custody lets the refinery skip its own field due diligence.

tanzanite.blurb: Bids on Mererani Block-D rough every Tuesday. Borjie's gemmological cert plus biometric off-take gets the lot loaded inside 48 hours.

coltan.blurb: ICP-MS-graded coltan from Kigoma artisanal sites. Audit chain provides the OECD due-diligence trail downstream EU buyers require.

pricing.heading: Free to browse. Commission on settled deals.
pricing.sub: Buyers pay nothing to register, search, and bid. Borjie takes a 2.5% commission on the final settled price of a deal you close on the platform.
bullets: No success fee on bids that don't close
pricing.footnote: Buyer-side commission is calculated on the gross settled value, charged at off-take signing, paid in TZS or USD per contract.

downloadCta.heading: Sign up to bid.
downloadCta.sub: The buyer mobile app is in private testing with sixteen Tanzanian and East African buyers. Join the waitlist for the September 2026 public release.

investorsPage.heading: Mining capital with telemetry.
investorsPage.sub: Borjie gives lenders and LPs daily evidence-cited briefs on every deployment — production, cash runway, FX exposure, regulator status.

valueProps.heading: Four pillars of investor evidence.
valueProps.sub: Built for the lender's question: what is actually happening on the ground today.

dailyBrief.title: Daily evidence-cited reports
dailyBrief.blurb: Every morning at 06:00 each portfolio mine produces a brief covering production, cash, licence status, and incidents. Cited line-by-line to source data.

usdCliff.title: 27-Mar-2026 USD cliff remediation
usdCliff.blurb: Tracks USD exposure against the regulatory cliff date. Suggests hedges, alternative invoice currencies, and gold-window settlements.

auditPack.title: Audit-pack export
auditPack.blurb: One-click export of the cryptographic audit chain, licences, royalty returns, OSHA logs, and bank reconciliations for due diligence.

treasury.title: Treasury simulation
treasury.blurb: Stress-test off-take timing, gold price moves, and TZS/USD swings. See the impact on covenant ratios before they happen.

caseStudy.heading: Indicative deployment.
caseStudy.sub: No closed deals yet. The figures below illustrate how the Borjie audit pack would surface a typical mid-sized Geita PML cluster to a senior secured lender.
caseStudy.disclaimer: Indicative only. Numbers are illustrative, not from an actual closed deal.
bullets: Daily 06:00 brief delivered to lender dashboard
Cryptographic audit chain over every PML transfer

contact.heading: Institutional inquiries.
contact.sub: For lenders, LPs, family offices, and DFIs interested in structured exposure to Tanzanian mining with cryptographic audit chains.

fields.name: Your name
fields.message: What would you like to discuss?

contact.success: Thank you. Our team will respond within 2 business days.
contact.error: Could not submit the form. Please email investors@borjie.co.tz.

blog.heading: Field notes from Tanzanian mining.
blog.sub: Writing on licences, treasury, geology, and the slow build of an AI-native operating system for the sector.

caseStudies.heading: Pilot case studies arriving Q3 2026.
caseStudies.sub: Ten pioneer operators across Geita, Mererani, and Songwe are running 12-week pilots. Once the first cohort completes we'll publish full case studies — production lift, cash-cycle compression, audit findings.

careers.heading: Build the operating system Tanzanian mining deserves.
careers.sub: Small team, deep mining context, Swahili-first. Hybrid Dar es Salaam / remote. We hire for taste, judgement, and care.

domain.title: Tanzania mining domain expert
domain.blurb: Senior mining engineer or geologist with deep PML/ML/SML and Tumemadini experience. You become the truth-teller for what our product must do.

engineer.title: Senior TypeScript engineer
engineer.blurb: Multi-tenant, Postgres, Hono, Next 15, AI-native. You ship end-to-end and treat every line as if it'll sit in a regulator's audit.

pilot.title: Pilot success manager
pilot.blurb: You live at our pilot sites. You know every operator by name. You translate field reality into product backlog every week.

values.heading: How we work
items: Swahili-first. English is the second language, not the default.
Field reality beats slide decks. Every PM visits a pilot site quarterly.
Cryptographic audit chain is non-negotiable. Every action signed.
Plain talk. We don't say synergy. We say what happened today.

about.heading: An operating system built for and by Tanzanian mining.
about.sub: Borjie was started by a small Tanzanian and diaspora team after watching another generation of operators run world-class deposits on spreadsheets.
about.originBody: We met across Geita and Dar es Salaam in 2024, swapping notes on why every mining ERP felt designed for someone else's country. By early 2026 we had a working Master Brain and ten pilots. The mission stayed the same: an operating system that respects how Tanzanian mining actually works — KYC for artisanal miners, royalty maths the TRA recognises, briefings in Swahili at 06:00.
about.teamSub: Tanzanian and diaspora. Mining, fintech, AI infrastructure. Hybrid Dar es Salaam.

values.title: Tanzanian-first
values.body: We optimise for the mine, the language, the regulator, and the currency our operators actually use.

values.title: Cryptographically honest
values.body: Every action sits on an append-only chain. Regulators, lenders, and operators can verify without trusting us.

values.title: Calm by default
values.body: Mining doesn't need another dashboard with red. The Master Brain handles overnight. Operators get a clear, restrained brief at 06:00.
